summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ACM app updates: Dataset Editor mandatory fields with asterisk markers, Image field removal for scratch_bench_phased, and 5-step Run Eval Modal with drag-and-drop pairing. All requested features are working correctly.

minor.issue: External Eval API validation requires problem_statement wrapped in <phases></phases> tags for scratch_bench_phased type
minor.note: This is expected backend validation behavior, not a bug

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
design_issues.details: Accessibility warning in console, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: DatasetEditorModal: Problem Statement field has asterisk (*) marker
DatasetEditorModal: Natural Language Tests field has asterisk (*) marker
DatasetEditorModal: Validation rejects empty Problem Statement with toast error
DatasetEditorModal: Validation rejects empty Natural Language Tests with toast error
DatasetEditorModal: scratch_bench_phased type has NO Image field in attributes
DatasetEditorModal: bug_bench type HAS Image field in attributes
DatasetEditorModal: bug_bench shows Repo, Eph Job ID, Image, Agent Name, Model Name fields
DatasetEditorModal: scratch_bench_phased shows only Subagents, Preview URL, Agent Name fields
RunEvalModal: Has 5 steps - Problems, Agents, Pair & Order, Configure, Review
RunEvalModal Step 1: Dataset list with checkboxes for multi-select
RunEvalModal Step 2: Agent list with checkboxes, Skip Agents button shown when none selected
RunEvalModal Step 3: Drag handles (GripVertical) visible on each pair row
RunEvalModal Step 3: First row shows '1st' badge
RunEvalModal Step 3: Subsequent rows show clock icon with queue number (2, 3, etc.)
RunEvalModal Step 3: Agent dropdown per row allows changing agent assignment
RunEvalModal Step 3: Problem dropdown per row allows changing problem assignment
RunEvalModal Step 3: 'Add Row' button successfully adds new pair row
RunEvalModal Step 3: Trash button successfully removes pair row
RunEvalModal Step 3: Queue notice shows 'Job #1 will start immediately. Jobs #2-N will be queued'
RunEvalModal Step 4: Configure resources - CPUs, Memory, Storage, User ID inputs work
RunEvalModal Step 4: Headed browser and Force rebuild toggles present
RunEvalModal Step 4: Experiment Config (optional) expandable section present
RunEvalModal Step 5 Review: Shows 'RUN' badge for first job
RunEvalModal Step 5 Review: Shows 'Q' badges (Q1, Q2, etc.) for queued jobs
RunEvalModal Step 5 Review: Queue notice appears when >1 job
RunEvalModal Step 5 Review: Submit button shows correct job count
RunEvalModal: Step navigation works correctly (Next, Back buttons)
RunEvalModal: All 5 step indicators are clickable for completed steps
critical_code_review_comments: @dnd-kit integration working - drag handles render and pair rows have proper data-testid attributes
Mandatory field markers (*) properly displayed for Problem Statement and Natural Language Tests
Type-specific attributes correctly show/hide Image field based on dataset type
seed_data_creation: None - used existing datasets and agents from API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features for iteration 11 are working: DatasetEditorModal has mandatory fields with asterisks, scratch_bench_phased has no Image field while bug_bench does, RunEvalModal has 5-step wizard with drag-and-drop pairing in Step 3. The @dnd-kit library is properly integrated with drag handles, position badges, and queue notices. Each pair row has data-testid='pair-row-{id}' and drag-handle-{id} for automated testing.
